great_work.label: Great Work
great_work.description: The concept of achieving exceptional results through focused effort and consistency.

productivity.label: Productivity
productivity.description: The principles and practices related to efficient and effective work output.

time_management.label: Time Management
time_management.description: The process of organizing and planning how to divide time between different activities.

consistency.label: Consistency
consistency.description: The principle of maintaining steady effort over time to achieve long-term results.

engagement.label: Engagement
engagement.description: The state of being mentally and emotionally involved in one's work.

time.label: Time
time.description: A measurable period during which an action, process, or condition exists or continues.

cost.label: Cost
cost.description: A perceived expenditure or sacrifice, often in terms of time or effort.

cumulative_effect.label: Cumulative Effect
cumulative_effect.description: The principle that small, repeated actions over time lead to significant results.

writing_a_page_a_day.label: Writing a Page a Day
writing_a_page_a_day.description: An example of a small, consistent action that leads to significant output over time.

book_a_year.label: Book a Year
book_a_year.description: The result of writing a page a day for a year.

remote_sensing.label: Remote Sensing
remote_sensing.description: The science of obtaining information about objects or areas from a distance, typically from aircraft or satellites.

urban_planning.label: Urban Planning
urban_planning.description: The technical and political process concerned with the development and design of land use and the built environment.

digital_image_processing.label: Digital Image Processing
digital_image_processing.description: The use of computer algorithms to perform image processing on digital images.

road_extraction.label: Road Extraction
road_extraction.description: The process of identifying and delineating road networks from satellite or aerial imagery.

satellite_imagery_analysis.label: Satellite Imagery Analysis
satellite_imagery_analysis.description: The examination and interpretation of data collected by satellites.

change_detection.label: Change Detection
change_detection.description: The process of identifying differences in the state of an object or phenomenon by observing it at different times.

urban_development.label: Urban Development
urban_development.description: The process of designing and shaping the physical and social environment of cities.

geospatial_data.label: Geospatial Data
geospatial_data.description: Data that have a geographic component and can be mapped.

aikaterini_karagianni.label: Aikaterini Karagianni
aikaterini_karagianni.description: Corresponding author of the study, researcher at Aristotle University of Thessaloniki.

international_journal_of_engineering_and.label: International Journal of Engineering and Geosciences
international_journal_of_engineering_and.description: Academic journal publishing the research article.

aristotle_university_of_thessaloniki.label: Aristotle University of Thessaloniki
aristotle_university_of_thessaloniki.description: University where the research was conducted.

landsat_5.label: Landsat 5
landsat_5.description: Satellite launched in 1984, decommissioned in 2013, used for change detection in the study.

landsat_8.label: Landsat 8
landsat_8.description: Satellite launched in 2013, used for detecting linear features through spatial enhancement.

spotmaps.label: SPOTmaps
spotmaps.description: Orthorectified satellite imagery products derived from SPOT 5 images, used for semi-automatic road extraction.

quickbird.label: QuickBird
quickbird.description: High-resolution commercial Earth observation satellite, used for object-oriented road extraction.

u.s._geological_survey_(usgs).label: U.S. Geological Survey (USGS)
u.s._geological_survey_(usgs).description: Agency providing free satellite imagery data.

kastoria.label: Kastoria
kastoria.description: City in northwestern Greece studied for its road network and cultural heritage.

lake_orestiada.label: Lake Orestiada
lake_orestiada.description: Lake surrounding Kastoria city, part of the Natura 2000 network.

natura_2000.label: Natura 2000
natura_2000.description: Network of protected areas in the European Union.

digital_processing.label: Digital processing
digital_processing.description: Methods applied to satellite images to enhance and extract features.

visual_interpretation.label: Visual interpretation
visual_interpretation.description: Manual analysis of satellite images to identify features.

semi-automatic_techniques.label: Semi-automatic techniques
semi-automatic_techniques.description: Methods combining automation with human input for feature extraction.

object-oriented_approach.label: Object-oriented approach
object-oriented_approach.description: Methodology that groups pixels into meaningful objects for analysis.

convolutional_neural_network_(cnn).label: Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)
convolutional_neural_network_(cnn).description: Deep learning model used for image classification and segmentation.

autonomous_vehicles.label: Autonomous Vehicles
autonomous_vehicles.description: Technology and systems enabling vehicles to operate without human intervention.

computer_vision.label: Computer Vision
computer_vision.description: Field of artificial intelligence focused on enabling computers to interpret and make decisions based on visual input.

road_detection.label: Road Detection
road_detection.description: Process of identifying and delineating road boundaries for navigation and safety.

semantic_segmentation.label: Semantic Segmentation
semantic_segmentation.description: Image processing technique that classifies each pixel in an image into a predefined class.

hsv_color_space_segmentation.label: HSV Color Space Segmentation
hsv_color_space_segmentation.description: Method of segmenting images based on Hue, Saturation, and Value color components.

hough_transform.label: Hough Transform
hough_transform.description: Image processing technique for detecting lines and curves.

edge_detection.label: Edge Detection
edge_detection.description: Process of identifying boundaries within images.

steering_assist_systems.label: Steering Assist Systems
steering_assist_systems.description: Systems that assist or automate vehicle steering based on road detection.

unstructured_roads.label: Unstructured Roads
unstructured_roads.description: Roads without clear markings or borders, requiring advanced detection methods.

semantic_segmentation_models.label: Semantic Segmentation Models
semantic_segmentation_models.description: Pre-trained models used for classifying pixels in images.

data_acquisition.label: Data Acquisition
data_acquisition.description: Process of collecting real-world data for training and testing autonomous systems.

isriti_2020.label: ISRITI 2020
isriti_2020.description: 3rd International Seminar on Research of Information Technology and Intelligent Systems held in 2020.

a.a._mahersatillah.label: A.A. Mahersatillah
a.a._mahersatillah.description: First author of the paper on unstructured road detection using HSV color space segmentation.

z._zainuddin.label: Z. Zainuddin
z._zainuddin.description: Second author of the paper, affiliated with Hasanuddin University's Department of Informatics Engineering.

y._yusran.label: Y. Yusran
y._yusran.description: Third author of the paper, affiliated with Hasanuddin University's Department of Electrical Engineering.

hasanuddin_university.label: Hasanuddin University
hasanuddin_university.description: University in Makassar, Indonesia, where the authors are affiliated.

hsv_color_space.label: HSV Color Space
hsv_color_space.description: Color model representing colors in terms of Hue, Saturation, and Value.

canny_edge_detector.label: Canny Edge Detector
canny_edge_detector.description: Algorithm for detecting edges in images by finding intensity gradients.

ade20k.label: ADE20K
ade20k.description: Pre-trained model used for semantic segmentation with 3,169 annotated classes.

opencv.label: OpenCV
opencv.description: Open-source library for computer vision and image processing.

autonomous_car.label: Autonomous Car
autonomous_car.description: Vehicle capable of sensing its environment and operating without human input.

steering_assist.label: Steering Assist
steering_assist.description: System that helps or automates vehicle steering based on road detection.

unstructured_road.label: Unstructured Road
unstructured_road.description: Road without clear markings or borders, requiring advanced detection methods.

structured_road.label: Structured Road
structured_road.description: Road with clear markings or borders, easier to detect.

gowa_regency.label: Gowa Regency
gowa_regency.description: Location in South Sulawesi, Indonesia, where road data was collected.

south_sulawesi.label: South Sulawesi
south_sulawesi.description: Province in Indonesia where Gowa Regency is located.

webcam.label: Webcam
webcam.description: Camera used for capturing road images in the study.

edges.context: Consistency enables the cumulative effect of work over time.
Writing a page a day consistently leads to writing a book in a year.
The cumulative effect of small daily actions results in significant output like a book a year.

HSV color space is used to segment road areas from non-road areas in semantic segmentation results.
Hough Transform connects detected edge pixels to form solid lines representing road boundaries.
Canny Edge Detector is used to detect edges in images for road boundary identification.
CNN is used as a pre-trained model for semantic segmentation in the study.
ADE20K model is used for semantic segmentation with 3,169 annotated classes.
OpenCV's library provides cv2.HoughLinesP() for line detection using Hough Transform.
Autonomous cars require steering assist systems to navigate roads safely.
Unstructured roads pose challenges for road detection due to lack of clear markings.
Structured roads simplify road detection due to clear markings and borders.
ISRITI 2020 seminar presented research on unstructured road detection for autonomous cars.
A.A. Mahersatillah is a postgraduate student at Hasanuddin University.
Z. Zainuddin is affiliated with Hasanuddin University's Department of Informatics Engineering.
Y. Yusran is affiliated with Hasanuddin University's Department of Electrical Engineering.
Road data for the study was collected in Gowa Regency, South Sulawesi.
A webcam was used to capture road images for the study.
